troop.notNpc: Cannot apply the troop template to a "{type}" actor — troops must be NPCs.
troop.abilityMissing: Troop ability item not found ({uuid}). The PF2e bestiary glossary pack is missing or out of date.

convert.sizeHint: The troop's token footprint. Published troops are Gargantuan.
convert.levelDeltaHint: Levels added on conversion. Published troops are the base creature +5.
convert.formUpHint: Adds the Form Up action and halves the splash-damage weakness.
convert.keepStrikesHint: Retain the base creature's strikes instead of replacing them with the generated troop attack actions.
